title: Maps, Strings, Bytes, Runes, Unicode, and Deterministic Results · Runtime Contract: Runes Utf8 Range
summary: An incident summarizer must count labels, normalize text, preserve UTF-8, and publish stable output despite unordered maps. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go runes utf8 range increment in a Unicode-safe deterministic incident summarizer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Decode UTF-8 with range and unicode/utf8 while handling byte indexes, replacement runes, invalid input, and grapheme limits.
Treat strings as immutable byte sequences and convert to or from byte slices with explicit allocation and encoding intent.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
